_publications._publicationTitle: Effects of Neurod1 Expression on Mouse and Human Schwannoma Cells.

_contextSnippet: we found that MB formation was completely suppressed by R26 ND1 in the anterior lobes of the cerebellum and is at least reduced in the posterior lobes
details: R26 ND1 completely suppressed medulloblastoma formation in anterior lobes of cerebellum and reduced formation in posterior lobes
